description_wiki: Brazil, officially the Federative Republic of Brazil, is the largest country in South America.

surface_forms: the beautiful New York City skyline
aliases: The City So Nice They Named It Twice
description: most populous city in the United States
description_wiki: New York, often called New York City (NYC), is the most populous city in the United States.

description: former skyscraper complex in Manhattan, New York (1968-2001)
description_wiki: The original World Trade Center (WTC) was a complex of seven buildings in the Financial District of Lower Manhattan in New York City.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

surface_forms: the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) program
description: immigration policy that protects from deportation certain undocumented immigrants to the United States who entered the country as minors
description_wiki: Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) is a United States immigration policy that allows some individuals who, on June 15, 2012, were physically present in the United States with no lawful immigration status after having entered the country as children at least five years earlier, to receive a renewable two-year period of deferred action from deportation and to be eligible for an employment authorization document (work permit).

description: president of the United States from 2009 to 2017 (born 1961)
description_wiki: Barack Hussein Obama II (born August 4, 1961) is an American politician who served as the 44th president of the United States from 2009 to 2017.

description: public research university in Minneapolis and Saint Paul, Minnesota, United States
description_wiki: The University of Minnesota Twin Cities (historically known as University of Minnesota) is a public land-grant research university in the Twin Cities of Minneapolis and Saint Paul, Minnesota, United States.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Minnesota is a state in the Upper Midwestern region of the United States.

aliases: Supreme Court of the United States of America
description: highest court of jurisdiction in the United States of America
description_wiki: The Supreme Court of the United States (SCOTUS) is the highest court in the federal judiciary of the United States.

surface_forms: The US Supreme Court struck down DOMA
description_wiki: The Defense of Marriage Act (DOMA) was a United States federal law passed by the 104th United States Congress and signed into law by  President Bill Clinton on September 21, 1996.
